# item

**Instance Property**

The unique identifier of the item linked by this linked item.

## Declaration

```swift
var item: Data
```

## Accessing linked item properties

- **account**: The unique identifier of the account, if any, to which the linked item belongs.

items.description: The unique identifier of the account, if any, to which the linked item belongs.
items.name: account

title: item
